critic_raw:
CRITIQUE:
1. HOLIDAY_POLICY_CONFOUND: Simultaneous holiday routing policy auto-declined high-loss categories.
2. SEASONAL_PERIOD_SHIFT: Comparing holiday to pre-holiday periods conflates seasonal fraud mix with model quality.
3. NO_SAME_DECISION_POLICY_BACKTEST: No fixed-rules replay.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE (seeing critique):
On holiday_policy_confound: I initially try to argue the policy was operationally necessary and the model operated within it. But I must concede: if transactions are auto-declined before reaching the model's review queue, chargebacks from those transactions are eliminated regardless of what the model does. The policy directly produces chargeback reduction independent of the model.

On seasonal_period_shift and no_same_decision_policy_backtest: Both conceded. No controlled comparison exists.
adjudication_raw: Round 1 resolves all issues. Holiday policy is the primary confound. Seasonal comparison is uncontrolled. No backtest. critique_wins.

debate_rounds.defender_response: Initial rebuttal attempt on holiday_policy_confound abandoned; full concession on all three.
